# Your New Business

> URL: https://sporim-sides.onrender.com

> I want to build SPORIM (Russian market, @sporimbot) and SIDES (English market, @sidesbot) — a peer-to-peer sports challenge platform inside Telegram. Think "Venmo for bets between friends" but we are NOT a bookmaker — we are an escrow technology platform.

THE PROBLEM
People constantly challenge each other on sports in chats: "I bet Arsenal wins", "wanna bet $50?", "if my team loses I pay for dinner". But these challenges are rarely paid out — someone forgets, someone dodges, nobody tracks it. We turn a conversational habit into a product.

THE SOLUTION
A Telegram bot where:
1. User picks a sports match (Premier League, NBA, World Cup), picks a side (Home / Draw / Away), and enters an amount in Telegram Stars
2. Bot generates an invite link (t.me/sporimbot?start=ref_123)
3. Friend clicks the link, accepts the challenge, both lock equal amount — bot holds funds (escrow)
4. After the match ends, bot checks the result via sports API and automatically sends the full pot to the winner minus 2% platform fee

Two modes:
- "Challenge a Friend" — private invite link for a specific person
- "The Market" — open list of unaccepted challenges, anyone can accept

WHY NOW
- May 30, 2025: Champions League Final — perfect viral launch event
- June 2025: NBA Finals
- Summer 2026: FIFA World Cup — millions of casual fans will want to challenge friends

THE BRAND
- RU/CIS: SPORIM (@sporimbot). "Sporim na sotku?" is already a meme in Russian chats — the name IS the call to action
- Global: SIDES (@sidesbot). "Pick a side." No taboo words (bet/wager/gamble). Clean for regulators and ad networks

POSITIONING
We are NOT gambling. We are a social escrow platform — like PayPal for friend challenges. We don't take bets, don't set odds, don't take risk. We hold funds between two private individuals and automate the transfer when a public sports result is confirmed.

REVENUE MODEL
Phase 1 (0-1000 users): 0% commission. Every free challenge is viral marketing.
Phase 2:
- Challenges above $50: 2% of pot
- Premium subscription ($4.99/mo): stats, rankings, tournament brackets
- White-label for Telegram sports channels: they get their own branded bot, earn 50% of commission
- Group challenges: entry-fee tournaments, bot takes 5%

COMPETITIVE GAP
Polymarket/Kalshi = for traders, not friends. WagerLab = separate app, virtual currency only. BetOpenly = web only, no Telegram. Predo Bot = blockchain/Solana, too complex. NO ONE does P2P sports challenges INSIDE Telegram with real money WITHOUT crypto.

WHAT I NEED FROM WILLO

1. BRAND & IDENTITY
   - Logo for SPORIM (sporty, bold, Russian-friendly)
   - Logo for SIDES (clean, international, tech-feel)
   - Color palette, typography, brand guidelines
   - Tagline ideas ("No house. Just you and them.")

2. LANDING PAGE
   - sporim.io (or similar) — hero section, how it works, sports supported, CTA to open Telegram bot
   - Mobile-first design (most traffic from Telegram)
   - Sections: Hero → How It Works → Sports Calendar → Trust/Escrow Explainer → FAQ → Footer
   - FAQ must address "Is this gambling?" — answer: no, we are technology escrow

3. GITHUB REPOSITORY
   - Python project structure for Telegram bot
   - Using python-telegram-bot v20 framework
   - Clean architecture: handlers/ (Telegram code), services/ (business logic), models.py (SQLAlchemy ORM), config.py
   - README with setup instructions
   - Placeholder for football-data.org API integration
   - Placeholder for Telegram Stars payment flow

4. ROADMAP
   - V1 (by May 23): MVP with Premier League, challenge creation, invite links, escrow, manual admin resolution, 0% commission
   - V1.1 (May 28): Auto-resolution via API, result share card
   - V1.2 (June): NBA support added
   - V2 (Summer 2026): World Cup, all leagues, white-label, commission enabled

5. ANALYTICS SETUP
   - Google Analytics or Plausible
   - Conversion funnel: Landing → Bot Open → Challenge Created → Challenge Accepted → Payment Deposited

6. EMAIL CAPTURE
   - Waitlist/early access form on landing page
   - Email for sports fans who want to know when we launch their favorite league

7. MARKETING ASSETS
   - 5 tweet/thread templates for launch
   - 3 Reddit post templates (r/soccer, r/NBA, r/startups)
   - Pitch text for Telegram sports channel admins (outreach template requesting they try the bot)

SPORTS API TO USE
- football-data.org (free tier) — Premier League, World Cup
- balldontlie.io (free) — NBA

TECH STACK
- Python 3.12 + python-telegram-bot v20
- SQLite + SQLAlchemy ORM (upgrade path to PostgreSQL)
- Telegram Stars (XTR) for payments
- Hosting: Railway or Replit

LEGAL POSITIONING
We use "challenge" not "bet". We use "escrow service" not "gambling platform". We process no fiat directly — only Telegram Stars. Terms of Service must state: "Users are responsible for compliance with local laws. Platform is a technology service provider, not a gambling operator."

HARD DEADLINE: Working MVP by May 23, 2025. Viral launch on Champions League Final (May 30).

## About

Your New Business is an AI-powered business. This file provides a brief overview for
language model crawlers and AI assistants.
